body.title: DickSimnel: WORKING/DONE/ESCALATE events to shared channel
body.result: DickSimnel WORKING/DONE/DECLINE/ESCALATE channel events; _channel_event() helper; 12 tests (c2f228a5)
body.description:
DickSimnel currently works silently — Akien and CC have no visibility into what it's doing. This ticket adds WORKING/DONE/ESCALATE channel events posted to the shared channel at key lifecycle points.

Events: DICKSIMNEL_WORKING (posted on ticket claim with ticket id + title), DICKSIMNEL_DONE (posted on close with ticket id + summary), DICKSIMNEL_ESCALATE (posted on escalation with ticket id + reason).

This is the observability foundation for the 2-week training period where Akien monitors Dick's work.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py

**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every state change per AR-009; use unseen_university.channel.post_to_channel (same pattern as other devices).

**Scope boundary:** In scope: three channel posts (WORKING on claim, DONE on close, ESCALATE on escalate/decline); author='dicksimnel'; channel='shared'. Out of scope: web UI display, IMAP routing, structured event parsing.

**Completion criteria:** test_dicksimnel_channel.py passes; monkeypatched post_to_channel is called at claim, close, and decline with correct author and event keyword; log records match expected pattern.
